availability.p: This information may not be reproduced without the explicit permission from the copyright holder. For copyright information, please contact Deryle Lonsdale at lonz@byu.edu

notesStmt.note: There are two versions of the Misereratur in Romanized Lushootseed.

app.rdg: Misereratur.
Debalh kwe tlas oshabƒìtem ato de Sherhk-Siam!
Debalh kwi tla asoshabetob atode Sherk-Siam

lilhzihu kwerkru dhual kwe boku stab,

alh kwe tlas orhtobolh twal kwi tlo Darhulƒìchelh skwƒÅkhƒìd!
halh kwi tlus ortobolhs dhual kwi tldahuhelechelh tskwakred.

Klub orh tsedelh kurhubiƒìt≈çbolh ƒÉtƒìt≈çskwadachelh,

ui kloborh tsedelh ki oshabetobolh

twal al ki mok stam skwƒÅkhed, ai de Sherk Siam Lilzirh kwƒìhkh twal mok stam torh ƒÅlh.
dhual boku stab tskwakred tode Sherk-Siam lilhzihu kwerkru dhual boku stab torhalh.
